member=-- | load_case=--
Row provenance

Engineer-in-loop: Results use a reduced story shear-building solver on CPU (GPU kernels are auxiliary smoke tests only). Optimization is physics- and rule-based search, not deployed ML. Cost and savings figures require unit-price provenance and post-optimization reanalysis gate artifacts before delivery. Compare mode overlays baseline geometry and section-id diffs; it does not replace licensed review or permit approval.

Insight
Live Summary
Core structural signals derived from the current viewer artifact.
Awaiting model -- Load an artifact to populate the live summary.
Evidence--Awaiting model
Optimization delta strip appears when before/after quantities are available.
Critical member triage appears when utilization data is available.
Result step schedule appears when a model artifact is loaded.
Result envelope appears when a model artifact is loaded.
Force-flow lens appears when applied load and member force evidence is available.
Story force ledger appears when load-combination force rows can be grouped by building level.
Load-combination force matrix appears when KDS force/check evidence is available.
Member force diagrams appear when a load combination and member force rows are selected.
Member force envelope appears when selected member force rows span load combinations.
Member force history appears when selected member force rows span load combinations.
Member material state appears when selected member forces can be paired with material evidence.
Member section capacity check appears when selected member forces can be paired with material and section evidence.
Member force playback appears when load-combination frames are available.
Panel-zone and joint evidence appears when solver-verified handoff evidence is available.
Delivery--Awaiting model
Optimization Summary
Before/after quantity, cost, and carbon deltas.
View Details
Optimization summary appears when a model artifact is loaded.
Critical Members
Top utilization and drift contributors linked to viewer selection.
Critical member ranking appears when utilization data is available.
Materials & Members
Material grades, properties, section families, and usage coverage.
Material model parity appears when original and optimized material signatures are available.
All source material model signatures appear when the MIDAS material library is loaded.
Material model demand atlas appears when locked material models can be paired with load-combination forces.
Material model force envelope appears when load combinations can be compared across locked material models.
Material model capacity envelope appears when material force demand can be compared with source or section-estimated capacity.
Material-force interaction appears when load-combination forces can be paired with locked material ids.
Material and member catalog appears when a model artifact is loaded.
Drawing Handoff
Sheet revision, callout, and viewer deep-link appear when a model is loaded.
Properties
Select an element
Why / Risk
Select a member to see section, material, load, D/C, optimization delta, and evidence status.
Review Report
Export an engineer-in-loop HTML report for the active project and selection.
Statistics
Drawing Quality
Real drawing quality data appears when a drawing preset is loaded.
Edit Preview
Select one or more members to stage a preview-only section reassignment.
Loadcomb Draft
Select a base combination to stage a bounded load-combination authoring draft.
